description: Configure Splunk's HTTP Event Collector (HEC) to receive logs from two cloud microservices. Log into the Splunk web interface at http://localhost:8000 using 'admin' / 'SplunkAdmin1!'. Globally enable the HTTP Event Collector and create a new index named 'cloud_apps'. Create two HEC tokens named 'webapp_frontend' and 'webapp_backend', ensuring both are enabled and mapped to the 'cloud_apps' index as their default index. Validate the setup by sending at least one test JSON event to the HEC endpoint (http://localhost:8088/services/collector/event) using one of the new tokens and verify the event is successfully ingested into the 'cloud_apps' index.
